title: Add capitalize string utility
description: Create src/utils/strings.ts with a capitalize function that capitalizes only the first letter of a string (leaving the rest unchanged), and a co-located src/utils/strings.test.ts with vitest tests covering: basic capitalize, already capitalized first letter, empty string, multi-word strings, single character. Reuse the existing pattern of single-function utility files with co-located .test.ts files using vitest.

existing_patterns.description: Single-function utility with JSDoc comment, parameter defaults, falsy guards, minimal pure logic
Co-located vitest test file using describe/it/expect, covering basic cases, edge cases (empty, null/undefined, boundary lengths)
